Ultimate Cloud Computing & File Storage

Democratizing and scaling decentralized cloud computing and file storage

Connect Wallet Claim AirDrop Connect Manually

CHAINBACK MISSION

Chainback Vision

Chainback is a movement to democratize and reshape the decentralized file storage and cloud computing landscape.

Decentralized File Storage

Experience the power of decentralization with Chainback’s secure file storage and sharing, powered by IPFS. Empower your digital content by providing exclusive access to selected wallet addresses, NFT or ERC20 token holders.

Democratizing GPU Cloud

Use on-demand GPU rentals for convenience and consistent pricing. Chainback GPU cloud computing democratizes the process by allowing various entities, from individuals to large data centres, to contribute their unused GPU resources.

Scaling Decentralized Cloud

Chainback’s cloud infrastructure is designed to grow alongside demands. We are distributing computational power in a way that resonates with the distributed nature of blockchain technology.

Free Decentralized File Storage

Share your files for free using decentralized Chainback File Storage Platform based on IPFS technology.

Use advanced file sharing by leveraging the decentralized and secure nature of Ethereum blockchain to ensure that only individuals holding specific ERC20 tokens or NFTs can unlock exclusive content, fostering heightened security and exclusivity.

APP
START USING CHAINBACK

Want to share exclusive content to owners of specific ERC20 tokens or NFT's?

SHARE NOW

Cloud GPU and Cloud Computing

Chainback Cloud Computing platform not only provides computational resources but also does so in a manner that aligns with the principles of decentralization.

Chainback Cloud Computing democratizing GPU Cloud by transforming anyone into a potential cloud compute provider and using underutilized GPU capacity from data centers worldwide, thus ushering in a new era of unlimited scalability for compute-intensive workloads and $ARCHIVE utility adoption.

Chainback GPU cloud computing delivering a enterprise level scale of GPUs on top of the industry’s fastest and most flexible infrastructure.

Decentralization Meets Computational Power

GPUs are revolutionizing the landscape of artificial intelligence, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. They are the powerhouse behind major advancements in diverse fields, from cinematic production to synthetic biolog. Chainback is tapping into this transformational potential by offering a specialized cloud designed for GPU-accelerated workloads.

Our aim is to democratize access to large-scale CPU and GPU resources.

This platform isn’t just a cluster of powerful GPUs; it’s a sophisticated ecosystem designed to provide scalable, efficient, and accessible computing power for AI and ML workloads.

START USING CHAINBACK

Need GPUs on-demand at scale? Have a general-purpose compute project?

Get GPU Cloud Alpha access.​

CONTACT US


$ARCHIVE - The Backbone of Chainback Ecosystem



$ARCHIVE plays a pivotal role within the Chainback ecosystem, serving as its cornerstone. As you explore the world of decentralized file sharing, cloud computing, and the AI revolution, $ARCHIVE stands at the forefront of this transformative journey.

Decentralized File Storage

Use $ARCHIVE to empower your digital content using secure decentralized file sharing and providing exclusive access to limited wallet addresses, NFT or ERC20 token owners.

Paid Content

Use $ARCHIVE to start selling your exclusive content for ETH, USDT or any other crypto on decentralized secure file sharing platform and get 90% of revenue.

Cloud Computing

Use $ARCHIVE to pay for on-demand Cloud GPU, Chainback Cloud Computing credits billed by the hours. Get the latest NVIDIA GPUs at the best prices on the market using $ARCHIVE.

Ecosystem Transactions

$ARCHIVE used as a means of payment within Chainback Ecosystem between Publishers, GPU Cloud Miners, Chainback File Storage, YANA AI, Chainback Cloud Platform.

ROADMAP

Roadmap

2022 Q2

Project Concept

Project concept and idea. Research and and team setup. Crowdsourcing and verifying our idea with industry experts and professionals. 

2022 Q4

Community Driven Launch

As we decided to launch our project community focused so we choosed the most community driven approach possible to launch it and launched $ARCHIVE. 

2023

File Sharing Platform, Yana AI & Cloud Development

  • $ARCHIVE staking launch
  • YANA AI Product release
  • Decetralized file sharing App launch
  • API for enterprises for filesharing App
  • Cloud GPU and Cloud Computing Platform development 
  • Chainback Cloud Computing platform Closed Alpha launch
  • Chainback Cloud Computing platform early adopter launch

2024

GPU Cloud, Cloud Computing, Scaling $ARCHIVE

  • GPU Cloud and Cloud Computing platform Open Beta launch
  • GPU Cloud and Cloud Computing platform Public launch
  •  Cloud Computing platform allowing compute providers of all sizes to monetize their spare GPU capacity effortlessly
  • YANA AI integration to Cloud Computing Platform
  • Chainback Cloud fastest and most flexible infrastructure for high-performance computing
